description: Public site key mapping for anonymous behavior telemetry
semantic_description: A public, non-secret site key (abk_...) bound to a single tenant. Embedded in published low-code apps / public sites to attribute anonymous telemetry events to the owning tenant. The key is server-generated on create and never edited; the tenant binding is immutable (rotate = create a new key + disable the old one).
lifecycle_description: Status lifecycle: active -> disabled. Disabling stops the key from resolving to its tenant (anonymous ingestion is rejected). Disable is reversible at the data level but treated as terminal operationally.
